examples: Some, Sometimes, Often, Usually, Ordinarily, Customarily, Most, Mostly.
When a node is not relevant, any associated controls customarily will be hidden.
When it is started by the ESC character itself (customarily just for hardware), or
Smith held Tyson from start to finish, never letting him land his customarily vicious shots.
In public, the men stand out for their long side curls, customarily worn by observant Jewish men.
